name: huperzine A
contraindications: Cholinergic adverse effects can include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, sweating, bradycardia, and vivid dreams or insomnia
use greater caution in people with bradyarrhythmia or strong cholinergic drug exposure.
acetylcholinesterase inhibitors and other cholinergic drugs (possible additive cholinergic effects including bradycardia/GI effects).
description: Huperzine A appears in records as a compound reported in huperzia serrata. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
summary: Huperzine A appears in records as a compound reported in huperzia serrata. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
mechanism: Potent reversible acetylcholinesterase inhibitor that increases synaptic acetylcholine; this is the clearest and highest-signal mechanism in the batch.
